hero.title: Gabriel
hero.description: Full Stack Developer from Brazil. Building scalable applications with React, TypeScript, and Go. Currently at Napp Solutions, deepening skills in system design and backend architecture.

markdown-editor.name: Markdown Editor
markdown-editor.description: A personal markdown editor built for daily use. Live preview, file explorer, command palette, and Claude Assist integration.

features.0: Live markdown preview with split view

db-query-app.name: DB Query App
db-query-app.description: Desktop application to edit and run SQL queries with AI assistance. Supports PostgreSQL and SQLite with intelligent query generation from natural language prompts.

features.0: AI-powered SQL query generation from prompts

focus-guard.name: Focus Guard
focus-guard.description: Productivity Chrome extension that helps maintain focus by blocking attention-stealing websites. Built-in Pomodoro timer and customizable blocking lists.

features.0: Block websites that steal your focus/attention

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: Always interested in hearing about new opportunities and collaborations.
